scene.location: Urban street corner with a large brick commercial building
scene.environment: Paved street with marked parking spaces, brick sidewalks, and nearby trees
scene.key_elements: Building with active flames and heavy black smoke from windows and roof, deployed fire truck, active hose lines

description: Significant structure fire at a large brick building situated on a street corner. Flames and thick black smoke are visibly billowing from multiple upper-story windows and the roof. Two firefighters are actively engaged in combatting the blaze, directing high-pressure streams of water from positions close to the building. One emergency vehicle, a fire truck, is positioned near the intersection to supply water to the hoses. Several civilian vehicles are parked along the street adjacent to the building. A group of seven civilians has gathered at a safe distance from the fire, observing the ongoing emergency operations.
